_comment: Decomposition rules for vanilla HTML/CSS/JS projects (no framework). Loaded when config has 'html' in frameworks. Prevents monolithic single-file apps.

rules.message: Large inline <style> block detected. Move styles to a separate CSS file and use <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/styles.css">. Inline styles create monolithic files that are hard to troubleshoot and waste context window when reading.

Large inline <script> block detected. Move logic to a separate JS file and use <script type="module" src="js/app.js">. Inline scripts create monolithic files that burn tokens on every read. ES modules let you split by concern.
DOM manipulation in index.html — move to a separate JS file. index.html should be a thin shell: structure + <link> + <script src> only. Keep logic in js/ files.
Direct innerHTML assignment in HTML file — XSS risk. Use textContent for text, or build DOM nodes with createElement/appendChild.
